lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੀ ਪੈਧਾ ਜਾਇ ਦਰਗਹ ਭਾਣੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: hukamee paidhaa jaae daragah bhaaneeai |
lines.english: If it pleases the Commander, one goes to His Court, robed in honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੇ ਹੀ ਸਿਰਿ ਮਾਰ ਬੰਦਿ ਰਬਾਣੀਐ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: hukame hee sir maar band rabaaneeai |5|
lines.english: By His Command, God's slaves are hit over the head. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਹਾ ਸਚੁ ਨਿਆਉ ਮਨਿ ਵਸਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: laahaa sach niaau man vasaaeeai |
lines.english: The profit is earned by enshrining Truth and justice in the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਿਖਿਆ ਪਲੈ ਪਾਇ ਗਰਬੁ ਵਞਾਈਐ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: likhiaa palai paae garab vayaaeeai |6|
lines.english: They obtain what is written in their destiny, and overcome pride. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਠਗਿ ਮੁਠੀ ਕੂੜਿਆਰ ਬੰਨੑਿ ਚਲਾਈਐ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: tthag mutthee koorriaar bana chalaaeeai |7|
lines.english: The cheaters are plundered by falsehood; they are chained and led away. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖੀਆ ਸਿਰਿ ਮਾਰ ਵਾਦਿ ਖਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: manamukheea sir maar vaad khapaaeeai |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs are hit over the head, and consumed by conflict.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਨਹਾਂ ਬਖਸਣਹਾਰੁ ਸਬਦੁ ਕਮਾਵਹੀ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: gunahaan bakhasanahaar sabad kamaavahee |8|
lines.english: He forgives our sins, when we practice the Teachings of the Guru's Word. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਵਸਾਇ ਨ ਪਛੋਤਾਵਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: saahib ridai vasaae na pachhotaavahee |
lines.english: Enshrine the Lord Master in your mind, and you shall not have to repent.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਤੁਝ ਬਿਨੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ਨਦਰਿ ਨਿਹਾਲੀਐ ॥੯॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: mai tujh bin avar na koe nadar nihaaleeai |9|16|
lines.english: Without You, I have no other at all; please, bless me with Your Glance of Grace. ||9||16||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਮੰਗੈ ਸਚੁ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਘਾਲੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: naanak mangai sach guramukh ghaaleeai |
lines.english: Nanak begs for the True Name, which is obtained by the Gurmukh.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Aasaa, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਿ ਟਿਕੈ ਘਰਿ ਆਇ ਸਬਦਿ ਉਤਾਵਲਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sach ttikai ghar aae sabad utaavalaa |1|
lines.english: The True Word of the Shabad has instantaneously come and settled in my heart. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਆ ਜੰਗਲੁ ਢੂਢੀ ਜਾਇ ਮੈ ਘਰਿ ਬਨੁ ਹਰੀਆਵਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: kiaa jangal dtoodtee jaae mai ghar ban hareeaavalaa |
lines.english: Why should I go searching in the forests, when the woods of my home are so green?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਦੇਖਾ ਤਹ ਸੋਇ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਜਾਣੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: jeh dekhaa teh soe avar na jaaneeai |
lines.english: Wherever I look, there He is; I know no other.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਇ ਮਹਲੁ ਪਛਾਣੀਐ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur kee kaar kamaae mehal pachhaaneeai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Working for the Guru, one realizes the Mansion of the Lord's Presence. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਲੈ ਸਦਾ ਰਜਾਇ ਅੰਕਿ ਸਮਾਵਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: chalai sadaa rajaae ank samaavee |2|
lines.english: One who ever walks in accordance with His Will, merges into His Being. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਵਸਿਆ ਮਨਿ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa saahib man vasai vasiaa man soee |
lines.english: When the True Lord dwells in the mind, that mind flourishes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਮਿਲਾਵੈ ਸਚੁ ਤਾ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਵਈ ॥
lines.translit: aap milaavai sach taa man bhaavee |
lines.english: The True Lord blends us with Himself, when it is pleasing to His Mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਦੇ ਵਡਿਆਈਆ ਦੇ ਤੋਟਿ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aape de vaddiaaeea de tott na hoee |3|
lines.english: He Himself grants greatness; His Gifts are never exhausted. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਬੇ ਤਬੇ ਕੀ ਚਾਕਰੀ ਕਿਉ ਦਰਗਹ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: abe tabe kee chaakaree kiau daragah paavai |
lines.english: Serving this and that person, how can one obtain the Lord's Court?

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਨੜਾ ਮਨੁ ਵੇਚੀਐ ਸਿਰੁ ਦੀਜੈ ਨਾਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: aapanarraa man vecheeai sir deejai naale |
lines.english: So offer your mind, and surrender your head with it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਥਰ ਕੀ ਬੇੜੀ ਜੇ ਚੜੈ ਭਰ ਨਾਲਿ ਬੁਡਾਵੈ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: pathar kee berree je charrai bhar naal buddaavai |4|
lines.english: If someone embarks on a boat of stone, he shall drown with its cargo. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੰਮਣ ਮਰਣਾ ਆਖੀਐ ਤਿਨਿ ਕਰਤੈ ਕੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: jaman maranaa aakheeai tin karatai keea |
lines.english: People discuss birth and death; the Creator created this.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਵਸਤੁ ਪਛਾਣੀਐ ਅਪਨਾ ਘਰੁ ਭਾਲੇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: guramukh vasat pachhaaneeai apanaa ghar bhaale |5|
lines.english: The Gurmukh realizes the true essence, and finds the home of his own self. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ਮਰਿ ਰਹੇ ਫਿਰਿ ਮਰਣੁ ਨ ਥੀਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: aap gavaaeaa mar rahe fir maran na theea |6|
lines.english: Those who conquer their selfhood and remain dead, shall never have to die again. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਈ ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਵਣੀ ਧੁਰ ਕੀ ਫੁਰਮਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: saaee kaar kamaavanee dhur kee furamaaee |
lines.english: Do those deeds which the Primal Lord has ordered for you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਤਨਾ ਪਾਰਖੁ ਸੋ ਧਣੀ ਤਿਨਿ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: ratanaa paarakh so dhanee tin keemat paaee |
lines.english: That Lord Master is the Assayer of the jewel of the mind; He places the value on it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਸਚੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥੮॥੧੭॥
lines.translit: naanak saahib man vasai sachee vaddiaaee |8|17|
lines.english: O Nanak, True is the Glory of that one, in whose mind the Lord Master dwells. ||8||17||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਮਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਦੇ ਮਿਲੈ ਕਿਨਿ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਪਾਈ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: je man satigur de milai kin keemat paaee |7|
lines.english: If one surrenders his mind upon meeting the True Guru, who can estimate its value? ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੑੀ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਿਸਾਰਿਆ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jinaee naam visaariaa doojai bharam bhulaaee |
lines.english: Those who have forgotten the Naam, the Name of the Lord, are deluded by doubt and duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Aasaa, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਕਿਉ ਛੂਟੀਐ ਜੇ ਜਾਣੈ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: bin naavai kiau chhootteeai je jaanai koee |
lines.english: Without the Name, how can one be emancipated? Who knows this?

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੂਲੁ ਛੋਡਿ ਡਾਲੀ ਲਗੇ ਕਿਆ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਛਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: mool chhodd ddaalee lage kiaa paaveh chhaaee |1|
lines.english: Those who abandon the roots and cling to the branches, shall obtain only ashes. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਦਿ ਜੁਗਾਦਿ ਨਿਰੰਜਨਾ ਜਨ ਹਰਿ ਸਰਣਾਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aad jugaad niranjanaa jan har saranaaee |2|
lines.english: The Lord's humble servant finds Sanctuary in Him, the Immaculate One, from the very beginning, and throughout the ages. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੑੀ ਏਕੋ ਸੇਵਿਆ ਪੂਰੀ ਮਤਿ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jinaee eko seviaa pooree mat bhaaee |
lines.english: Those who serve the One Lord become perfect in their understanding, O Siblings of Destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਇ ਤ ਛੂਟੀਐ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਪਤਿ ਖੋਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh hoe ta chhootteeai manamukh pat khoee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: One who becomes Gurmukh is emancipated; the self-willed manmukhs lose their honor. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਏਕੁ ਹੈ ਅਵਰੁ ਨਹੀ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: saahib meraa ek hai avar nahee bhaaee |
lines.english: My Lord and Master is the One; there is no other, O Siblings of Destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਸਾਚੇ ਪਰਥਾਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: kirapaa te sukh paaeaa saache parathaaee |3|
lines.english: By the Grace of the True Lord, celestial peace is obtained. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਦਿਖਾਵੈ ਵਾਟੜੀਂ ਸਚੀ ਭਗਤਿ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਏ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: aap dikhaavai vaattarreen sachee bhagat drirraae |4|
lines.english: He Himself reveals the Way, and implants true devotion within. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਪਾਇਓ ਕੇਤੀ ਕਹੈ ਕਹਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: gur bin kinai na paaeo ketee kahai kahaae |
lines.english: Without the Guru, no one has obtained Him, although many may claim to have done so.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖੁ ਜੇ ਸਮਝਾਈਐ ਭੀ ਉਝੜਿ ਜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh je samajhaaeeai bhee ujharr jaae |
lines.english: Even if the self-willed manmukh is instructed, he stills goes into the wilderness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਨ ਛੂਟਸੀ ਮਰਿ ਨਰਕ ਸਮਾਏ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: bin har naam na chhoottasee mar narak samaae |5|
lines.english: Without the Lord's Name, he shall not be emancipated; he shall die, and sink into hell. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮਿ ਮਰੈ ਭਰਮਾਈਐ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਲੇਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: janam marai bharamaaeeai har naam na levai |
lines.english: He wanders through birth and death, and never chants the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕੀ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਨਾ ਪਵੈ ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸੇਵੈ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: taa kee keemat naa pavai bin gur kee sevai |6|
lines.english: He never realizes his own value, without serving the Guru. ||6||
